features.name: non-blocking assignment with Z literal RHS
features.description: Code should include a procedural non-blocking assignment where the right-hand side is a Z literal (1'bz)

features.name: ternary operator producing Z in procedural context
features.description: Code should include a ternary conditional operator that can produce Z as its result, used in a procedural non-blocking assignment

features.name: multi-driver signal with Z-valued drivers
features.description: Code should include a signal driven by multiple always blocks using non-blocking assignments, where at least one driver can assign Z
